pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the youth fastpitch softball league with quick access to key actions, featured seasons/programs, and a personalized snapshot of the user’s saved items.
primary_functions: Provide quick links to Programs, Schedule, Clinics, Teams, Fields, Volunteer, Store, and Rules sections
Highlight current or upcoming seasons, featured programs, and important announcements
Show shortcuts to register for popular divisions such as 12U and to view todays games
Surface entry points to user-specific areas like My Schedule and My Dashboard

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click main navigation 'Programs' or homepage CTA such as 'Register for Spring Programs'
Click main navigation 'Schedule' or a 'View Today’s Games' link
Click 'Clinics & Camps' navigation or a featured clinic promo
Click 'Find a Team' tile in homepage shortcuts
Click 'Reserve a Practice Field' shortcut
Click 'Volunteer' navigation or homepage volunteer banner
Click 'Store' navigation or featured merch block
Click 'Rules & Policies' navigation or announcement link
Click 'My Dashboard' shortcut card
Click 'Go to My Schedule' from the Today’s Games or personal snapshot widget

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Home' in the main header navigation
Accessible via 'Home' in the footer links
Accessible by entering the league root URL which resolves to index.html

pages.name: Programs & Registration
pages.description: Listing and filtering of league programs (seasons, divisions, sessions) with inline registration and the ability to deep-link into specific sessions.
primary_functions: Filter programs by season (e.g., Spring 2026), age division (e.g., 12u), day of week, and time of day
Sort programs and sessions by price, date, or time (including Price: Low to High)
Display detailed session information such as days, times, field, and price
Open and complete a registration form for a selected program/session, including player and guardian information and payment options (e.g., Pay in full)

incoming_params.description: Preselects a season such as the Spring 2026 Season in the season filter.
Preselects a division such as 12U in the division filter.
Optional filter for days of week; may use values like 'weekday' to include Monday–Friday only.
Optional time-of-day filter using values that align with getProgramFilterOptions.time_ranges.value (e.g., 'evening_17_21').
Optional sort choice such as 'price_asc' for Price: Low to High.
When present, loads details for a specific ProgramSession and opens the inline registration panel for that session.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'View Details & Register' button on a listed session row to open that session’s detail and registration panel.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the Programs & Registration page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Programs' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Programs' in the footer links.
Season, division, and session can be deep-linked using query parameters such as seasonId, divisionId, and sessionId.

pages.name: Games Schedule
pages.description: Comprehensive league game schedule with division/team filters, date range controls, and the ability to save games to a personal schedule.
primary_functions: Filter games by division (e.g., 14u), team (e.g., Thunder), and date range
Sort games by date and time in ascending order to find upcoming games
Display game details such as date, time, field, opponent, and status
Add or remove individual games from the users My Schedule list via an Add to My Schedule or Favorite control

incoming_params.description: Preselects a division to filter games (e.g., 14U).
Preselects a team, such as the 14U Thunder, to filter the schedule.
Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter games on or after a specific date like 2026-05-01.
Optional end date for the schedule filter range.
Optional sort value such as 'date_time_asc' to show earliest upcoming games first.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Go to My Schedule' from the schedule page after saving one or more games.
Click on a team name link in a game row to view that team’s details.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the Games Schedule page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Schedule' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Schedule' in the footer links.
Division, team, and date range filters can be preconfigured using query parameters such as divisionId, teamId, and startDate.

pages.name: Volunteer Opportunities
pages.description: Volunteer shift listing and signup for roles such as concession stand across different fields and dates, with filters for month, field, role, and time of day.
primary_functions: Filter volunteer opportunities by month (e.g., June 2026), location/field (e.g., Field 2), role/type (e.g., Concession Stand), and time of day
Sort shifts by date and time (e.g., Date & Time: Earliest First) to identify the earliest evening options
Display shift details including role, field, date, start/end times, and remaining slots
Open and submit a volunteer signup form for a selected shift, capturing contact information and confirming the chosen shift

incoming_params.description: Month filter value like '2026-06' to show June 2026 volunteer opportunities.
Optional field identifier to pre-filter shifts at a specific field such as Field 2.
Optional role filter using values like 'concession_stand'.
Optional time-of-day filter like 'evening' to show evening shifts only.
Sort choice for shifts, e.g., 'date_time_asc' to show earliest shifts first.
When present, automatically loads details for the specified volunteer shift and opens the signup form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Sign Up' on a specific shift row to open that shift’s detail/signup view.
Click 'View My Volunteer Shifts' after confirming a signup.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the Volunteer Opportunities page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Volunteer' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Volunteer' in the footer links.
Month, field, role, and specific shift can be addressed via query parameters such as month and shiftId.

pages.name: League Store
pages.description: Online store for league merchandise with category browsing, filters, and links to product detail pages.
primary_functions: Browse store categories such as Apparel, Hats, and Accessories
Filter products within a category by attributes such as type (e.g., youth_t_shirts, water_bottles), price range (e.g., maximum price), and customer rating
Display product grids or lists with basic info (name, thumbnail, price, rating) and quick links to detail pages
Provide category-specific filters such as size segments (youth vs adult) when relevant

incoming_params.description: Preselects a store category like Apparel, Hats, or Accessories.
Optional product type filter, e.g., 'youth_t_shirt', 'hat', or 'water_bottle'.
Optional maximum price filter for the current category.
Optional minimum rating filter, e.g., 4.0 when searching for highly rated water bottles.
Optional size segment filter like 'youth', 'adult', or 'one_size'.
Sort choice for products such as 'price_asc' or 'rating_desc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card or name in the product grid/list.
Click the cart icon or 'View Cart' from the store page.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the League Store page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Store' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Store' in the footer links.
Category and filter state can be deep-linked using parameters like categoryId and maxPrice.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific store product with options and cart integration.
primary_functions: Display full product information including images, description, price, rating, and availability
Allow selection of options such as size (e.g., youth_m, adult) and color or style where applicable
Add the configured product (correct size/color) to the shopping cart
Show related or recommended products and a link back to the originating store category

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose details should be displayed.
Optional category ID used to build a 'Back to Category' link to the store listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after adding an item to the cart.
Click 'Back to Store' or 'Back to Category' from the product detail page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via product ID parameter in the query string, e.g., product.html?id=123.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart review page prior to checkout.
primary_functions: List all items added to the cart with key details (name, selected options, price, quantity, subtotal)
Allow updating quantities or removing items from the cart
Display order totals including any estimated tax or fees as applicable
Provide a clear action to proceed to the checkout flow

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Checkout' button from the cart page.
Click 'Continue Shopping' from the cart page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via cart icon or 'View Cart' links from store and product pages.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout flow for completing purchases from the league store.
primary_functions: Collect customer contact and shipping information for the order
Allow selection of shipping methods such as Standard Shipping
Show an order summary with items, prices, and selected shipping method for final review
Submit the order to complete the purchase process

incoming_params.description: Optional multi-step indicator (e.g., 'shipping', 'review'); default is first step when omitted.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue Shopping' on the order confirmation screen after successful checkout.
Click 'Back to Cart' from checkout prior to submitting the order.

access_methods.description: Reached after clicking 'Checkout' from cart.html.
Users may also navigate directly to checkout.html; the page will load the current cart summary if one exists.

pages.name: Clinics & Camps
pages.description: Listing and detail view for clinics and camps, including pitching clinics, with registration.
primary_functions: Filter clinics and camps by month (e.g., July 2026), skill focus (e.g., pitching), and price range (e.g., maximum price $120)
List clinics with key info such as dates, times, total training hours, and price
Open a clinic detail view (using query parameters) that shows full description, schedule, and total training hours
Compare clinic options and submit a registration form for the selected clinic, capturing player and guardian information

incoming_params.description: Month filter such as '2026-07' to show July 2026 clinics.
Skill focus filter, e.g., 'pitching'.
Maximum price filter (e.g., 120) used when searching for clinics under a budget.
Sort option, such as 'hours_desc' or 'price_asc', for ordering clinic results.
When present, opens the detail view for a specific clinic within this page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Details' on a clinic card to open that clinic’s detail panel.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the Clinics & Camps page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Clinics & Camps' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Clinics & Camps' in the footer links.
Month, skill focus, and specific clinic are addressed via parameters such as month and clinicId.

pages.name: Fields & Reservations
pages.description: Field availability and reservation calendar for practices and other bookings.
primary_functions: Display a reservation calendar with a date picker to select specific days (e.g., an upcoming Wednesday)
Filter visible time slots by division (e.g., 12u), time window (e.g., between 6:00 PM and 8:00 PM), and field features (e.g., lights)
Show available one-hour field slots with field names and feature indicators
Open a reservation form for a selected slot, capture team and coach information, and confirm the booking

incoming_params.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) preselected on the reservation calendar.
Division filter identifier (e.g., the 12U division).
Optional field ID to narrow slots to a specific field.
Time window filter corresponding to getFieldReservationFilterOptions.time_windows, e.g., '18:00-20:00'.
Optional flag indicating only lighted fields should be shown.
When present, opens the reservation form for the specified slot.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an available slot in the calendar or list to open the reservation form.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the Fields & Reservations page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Fields & Reservations' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Fields & Reservations' in the footer links.
Date, division, and specific reservation slot can be deep-linked using parameters like date and reservationSlotId.

pages.name: Team Finder
pages.description: Tool for locating teams based on age division, skill level, location, and practice schedule.
primary_functions: Filter teams by age division (e.g., 10u), skill level (e.g., beginner or recreational), ZIP code, and radius in miles
Filter or refine by practice days (e.g., Tuesday and Thursday) and display practice start times
List matching teams with basic info like team name, division, skill level, and abbreviated practice schedule
Provide links to full team detail pages for more information and saving to personal lists

incoming_params.description: Division filter value like the 10U division for age-appropriate team search.
Skill level filter such as 'beginner' or 'recreational'.
ZIP code used as the center for distance calculations (e.g., '12345').
Search radius in miles (e.g., 10 for teams within 10 miles).
Comma-separated list of practice days to include, e.g., 'tuesday,thursday'.
Optional sort, such as 'practice_time_asc', to show teams with earliest practice start times first.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a team result row or 'View Team' link.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the Team Finder page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Teams' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Teams' in the footer links.
Filter criteria like division, skill level, and ZIP can be pre-populated via query parameters such as divisionId and zip.

pages.name: Team Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for an individual team.
primary_functions: Display full team information including division, skill level, practice location, practice days and times
Show coach or manager contact details such as email and phone number
Allow the user to save the team to their personal My Teams list, optionally adding a descriptive note
Link back to the Team Finder results for continued browsing

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the team whose details should be displayed.
Optional value indicating where the user navigated from, such as 'teams' for Team Finder, used to configure back links.
Optional serialized representation of the original Team Finder filters, enabling a 'Back to Results' link preserving search criteria.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Team Results' when returnTo indicates navigation from Team Finder.
Click 'View My Teams' after saving a team to the user’s list.

access_methods.description: Accessed via teamId parameter in the query string, e.g., team_detail.html?teamId=abc123.

pages.name: Rules & Policies
pages.description: Central hub for league rules, division-specific regulations, and global policies like the Code of Conduct.
primary_functions: Allow selection of division-specific rules (e.g., 12u) and categories such as equipment or bat regulations
Display a list of rule documents and policies, including items like 12U Bat Rules and the Code of Conduct
Open an individual rule or policy in a detail view (via articleId or similar parameter) with full text
Provide a Save to My Resources or Bookmark action for rule and policy documents

incoming_params.description: Division code filter such as '12u' to focus on division-specific rules.
Rule category filter like 'bat_regulations' or 'code_of_conduct'.
Short identifier of a specific rule document, such as 'code_of_conduct' or 'bat_rules_12u', used to open that document’s detail view.
Internal rule_document_id used by in-page links to load full document details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a rule or policy title in the rules list to view its full content.
Click 'View My Resources' after saving a rule or policy document.
Click breadcrumb 'Home' from the Rules & Policies page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Rules & Policies' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Rules & Policies', 'Code of Conduct', and '12U Rules' footer links.
Division and specific documents are addressed via parameters such as division=12u and articleId=code_of_conduct.

pages.name: My Dashboard
pages.description: Personal dashboard aggregating the user’s saved games, volunteer shifts, teams, and resources with simple management actions.
primary_functions: Show a My Schedule section listing all games the user has saved from the Games Schedule page
Show a My Volunteer Shifts section listing all confirmed volunteer commitments, including date, time, field, and role
Show a My Teams section listing teams the user has saved, including stored notes such as Beginner 10U within 10 miles of 12345
Show a My Resources section listing saved rule and policy documents such as 12U bat rules and the Code of Conduct
Allow basic management actions, such as removing items from any of the personal lists

incoming_params.description: Optional section shortcut; supported values include 'my_schedule', 'my_volunteer_shifts', 'my_teams', and 'my_resources'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a game row’s 'View in Schedule' link from the My Schedule section.
Click 'Find More Shifts' from the My Volunteer Shifts section.
Click 'Find More Teams' from the My Teams section.
Click on a saved resource title in the My Resources section.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'My Dashboard' and 'My Schedule' links in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'My Dashboard' in the footer links.
The view parameter can be used to deep-link directly to a specific dashboard section.

header_links.description: Browse and register for league seasons and programs
View game schedules and save games to My Schedule
Browse and register for skills clinics and camps
Find teams by age, skill level, and location
View field availability and reserve practice fields
Sign up for volunteer opportunities such as concession stand shifts
Shop for league apparel, hats, and accessories
View league rules, division regulations, and Code of Conduct
Go directly to the My Schedule section of the personal dashboard
View all personal items including schedule, volunteer shifts, teams, and saved resources

footer_links.description: Direct link to the league Code of Conduct policy
Division-specific rules for 12U, including bat regulations
Personal dashboard for saved games, teams, shifts, and resources
